prd_ref: PRD: VibePilot Dashboard Rebrand — vibeflow → vibepilot (v1.0)
planning_principles: Isolation-first: Each slice operates on distinct file sets with no overlap
Cascade prevention: No cross-slice code dependencies
Text-only changes: Zero visual or functional modifications

slices.name: Core Documentation
slices.description: Updates main documentation markdown files with vibepilot branding
exposes: Updated documentation with consistent vibepilot branding
slices.boundaries: Does NOT touch config files, plan files, research docs, or root-level project docs. Only core docs/ markdown files.

tasks.title: Update vibeflow_dashboard_analysis.md content
tasks.purpose: Replace all vibeflow/vibeflow references with vibepilot/vibepilot in the dashboard analysis document
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: You are updating brand references in docs/vibeflow_dashboard_analysis.md. This file contains analysis of the dashboard and has multiple occurrences of the legacy 'vibeflow' brand name that need to be replaced with 'vibepilot'. This is a text-only change - no structural modifications to the document.

WHAT TO BUILD: Perform case-preserving text replacement throughout the file. 'vibeflow' → 'vibepilot', 'Vibeflow' → 'VibePilot', 'VIBEFLOW' → 'VIBEPILOT'.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All occurrences of vibeflow (any case) replaced with vibepilot equivalent
2. Document structure preserved (headers, lists, code blocks)
3. File remains valid markdown
4. grep -i 'vibeflow' docs/vibeflow_dashboard_analysis.md returns empty

OUTPUT FORMAT: Provide count of replacements made and confirm file was saved successfully.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Needs to read existing file and perform multiple text replacements
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Straightforward text replacement in a single file. Well-defined scope, no dependencies, simple verification.

tasks.title: Update vibeflow_review.md content
tasks.purpose: Replace all vibeflow references with vibepilot in the review document
objectives: Replace all case variants of vibeflow with vibepilot equivalents
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Update brand references in docs/vibeflow_review.md. This is a review document containing multiple occurrences of 'vibeflow' that need to be replaced with 'vibepilot'. Text-only change with no structural modifications.

WHAT TO BUILD: Perform comprehensive case-preserving text replacement: vibeflow→vibepilot, Vibeflow→VibePilot, VIBEFLOW→VIBEPILOT.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All vibeflow occurrences replaced (case-insensitive check)
2. Markdown formatting preserved
3. No unintended content changes
4. Validation confirms zero remaining occurrences

OUTPUT FORMAT: Confirm replacement count and file save status.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Single file modification with text replacements
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Single file text replacement. Clear scope, simple verification via grep.

tasks.title: Update vibeflow_adoption.md content
tasks.purpose: Replace all vibeflow references with vibepilot in the adoption guide
objectives: Perform case-preserving text replacement throughout document
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Update docs/vibeflow_adoption.md by replacing all occurrences of 'vibeflow' with 'vibepilot' using case-preserving rules. This is an adoption guide document with brand references throughout.

WHAT TO BUILD: Execute sed or Python-based replacement: lowercase→lowercase, title→title, uppercase→uppercase.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All case variants of vibeflow replaced
2. Document structure intact
3. grep -i 'vibeflow' returns empty
4. File saved successfully

OUTPUT FORMAT: Report replacement count and confirmation.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Single file text replacement requiring read access
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Single file operation with well-defined replacement pattern.

tasks.title: Update remaining core docs (prd_v1.3, UPDATE_CONSIDERATIONS, etc.)
tasks.purpose: Batch update remaining core documentation files with vibeflow references
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Batch update multiple core documentation files that contain vibeflow references. Files: prd_v1.3.md, UPDATE_CONSIDERATIONS.md, infrastructure_gap_analysis.md, tech_stack.md. Use efficient batch processing with sed or find/exec.

WHAT TO BUILD: Execute case-preserving replacement across all target files in a single operation.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All listed files processed
2. grep -i 'vibeflow' docs/prd_v1.3.md docs/UPDATE_CONSIDERATIONS.md docs/infrastructure_gap_analysis.md docs/tech_stack.md returns empty
3. All files remain valid markdown
4. List of modified files provided

OUTPUT FORMAT: List each file with count of replacements made.

tests_pass: Zero vibeflow in all processed files

tasks.routing_flag_reason: Multiple file modifications requiring filesystem access
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Batch file processing with clear file list. Slightly more complex due to multiple files but still straightforward.

tasks.title: Validate core docs slice - zero vibeflow remaining
tasks.purpose: Final verification that all core docs have zero vibeflow occurrences
objectives: Run grep across all core docs files
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Final validation for the docs-core slice. Must confirm 100% replacement of vibeflow with vibepilot across all modified files.

WHAT TO BUILD: Execute comprehensive grep validation across: vibeflow_dashboard_analysis.md, vibeflow_review.md, vibeflow_adoption.md, prd_v1.3.md, UPDATE_CONSIDERATIONS.md, infrastructure_gap_analysis.md, tech_stack.md.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. grep -i 'vibeflow' on all target files returns empty
2. Any remaining occurrences documented with exact locations
3. Slice marked PASS or FAIL based on results

OUTPUT FORMAT: Per-file validation results with final PASS/FAIL status.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: 4 summary dependencies, needs grep access for validation
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Read-only validation with clear pass/fail criteria.

slices.name: Research Documentation
slices.description: Updates research subdirectory markdown files with vibepilot branding
exposes: Updated research docs with vibepilot branding
slices.boundaries: Only docs/research/ directory. Does NOT touch other docs/ files.

tasks.title: Update research docs - raindrop and interface spec
tasks.purpose: Replace vibeflow with vibepilot in research documents
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Update research documentation files in docs/research/ directory. Target files: raindrop-vibeflow-20260219.md (note: filename will be renamed in file-rename slice), vibes_interface_specification.md. Replace all vibeflow references with vibepilot.

WHAT TO BUILD: Perform case-preserving text replacement in both files. Note: Only update CONTENT, not filenames (renaming handled by separate slice).

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All vibeflow occurrences replaced in both files
2. Content remains valid markdown
3. grep -i 'vibeflow' on both files returns empty
4. Files saved successfully

OUTPUT FORMAT: Replacement counts per file with confirmation.
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Two-file batch update with clear replacement pattern.

tasks.title: Validate research docs slice
tasks.purpose: Verify zero vibeflow occurrences in research documentation
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Final validation for research docs slice. Verify that raindrop-vibeflow-20260219.md and vibes_interface_specification.md have zero vibeflow occurrences.

WHAT TO BUILD: Execute grep validation and report results.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. grep -i 'vibeflow' docs/research/*.md returns empty
2. Any remaining occurrences documented
3. Slice validation status reported

OUTPUT FORMAT: Grep results with PASS/FAIL status.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Single summary dependency, needs grep access

slices.name: Configuration Prompts
slices.description: Updates prompt configuration files with vibepilot branding
exposes: Updated prompt configurations with vibepilot branding
slices.boundaries: Only config/prompts/ and config/researcher_context.md. Does NOT touch other config files.

tasks.title: Update prompt config files
tasks.purpose: Replace vibeflow with vibepilot in prompt templates and researcher context
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Update prompt configuration files that guide agent behavior. Files: config/prompts/consultant.md, config/researcher_context.md. These contain system prompts with vibeflow references that need updating to vibepilot.

WHAT TO BUILD: Execute case-preserving replacement: vibeflow→vibepilot, Vibeflow→VibePilot, VIBEFLOW→VIBEPILOT.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All vibeflow occurrences replaced in both files
2. Files remain valid markdown
3. Prompt structure preserved
4. grep -i 'vibeflow' on both files returns empty

OUTPUT FORMAT: Replacement counts per file with confirmation.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Multiple file modifications in config directory
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Two-file update with clear scope and simple verification.

tasks.title: Validate config prompts slice
tasks.purpose: Verify zero vibeflow in prompt configuration files
objectives: Run grep on config/prompts/consultant.md and config/researcher_context.md
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Final validation for config-prompts slice. Verify consultant.md and researcher_context.md have zero vibeflow occurrences.

WHAT TO BUILD: Execute grep validation and report results.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. grep -i 'vibeflow' config/prompts/consultant.md config/researcher_context.md returns empty
2. Any issues documented
3. Validation status reported

OUTPUT FORMAT: Grep output with PASS/FAIL status.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Single summary dependency, needs grep access

slices.name: Plans and JSON Config
slices.description: Updates JSON plan files with vibepilot branding
exposes: Updated plan metadata with vibepilot branding
slices.boundaries: Only JSON files in plans/ directory. Does NOT touch markdown files.

tasks.title: Update JSON plan files
tasks.purpose: Replace vibeflow with vibepilot in JSON plan files while preserving validity
objectives: Check plans/vibepilot_plan.json for any vibeflow references
Check plans/vibepilot_prd.json for any vibeflow references
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Update JSON plan files in plans/ directory. Files may contain vibeflow references in metadata or content. Must preserve JSON validity while replacing text.

WHAT TO BUILD: Perform case-preserving text replacement in all JSON files, then validate with jq or Python json module that files remain parseable.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All plans/*.json files processed
2. JSON validation passes (jq . file.json or python -m json.tool)
3. grep -i 'vibeflow' plans/*.json returns empty
4. No structural changes to JSON objects

OUTPUT FORMAT: List modified files with replacement counts and JSON validation status.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: JSON file modifications require careful handling and validation
tasks.confidence_reasoning: JSON files require careful editing to preserve validity, but text replacement is straightforward.

tasks.title: Validate plans JSON files
tasks.purpose: Verify zero vibeflow and valid JSON in plan files
objectives: Validate JSON parseability of all plan files
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Final validation for plans-config slice. Must verify JSON files are valid and contain no vibeflow references.

WHAT TO BUILD: Run JSON validation (jq or Python) and grep for vibeflow across all plans/*.json files.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All plans/*.json files parseable as valid JSON
2. grep -i 'vibeflow' plans/*.json returns empty
3. Validation report generated

OUTPUT FORMAT: JSON validation results and grep output with final PASS/FAIL.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Single summary dependency, needs JSON validation tools
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Read-only validation with JSON parsing verification.

slices.name: Project Meta Files
slices.description: Updates root-level project markdown files with vibepilot branding
exposes: Updated project meta files with vibepilot branding
slices.boundaries: Only root-level markdown files (not in subdirectories). Does NOT touch code files.

tasks.title: Update project meta documentation files
tasks.purpose: Replace vibeflow with vibepilot in root-level project docs
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Update root-level project markdown files that contain session notes, changelogs, and agent communications. These files document project history and contain vibeflow references throughout. Files: SESSION_NOTES.md, SESSION_NOTES_2026-02-18.md, CHANGELOG.md, CURRENT_STATE.md, PENDING.md, AGENT_CHAT.md.

WHAT TO BUILD: Execute batch case-preserving replacement across all target files using find/exec or sed.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All listed files processed
2. grep -i 'vibeflow' on all files returns empty
3. Files remain valid markdown
4. List of files with replacement counts provided

OUTPUT FORMAT: Per-file replacement counts with total summary.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Multiple root-level file modifications requiring filesystem access
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Six files to update in batch. Slightly lower confidence due to number of files but still straightforward text replacement.

tasks.title: Validate project meta files
tasks.purpose: Verify zero vibeflow in root-level project documentation
objectives: Run grep on all meta files
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Final validation for project-meta slice. Verify all root-level markdown files have zero vibeflow occurrences.

WHAT TO BUILD: Execute grep validation across: SESSION_NOTES.md, SESSION_NOTES_2026-02-18.md, CHANGELOG.md, CURRENT_STATE.md, PENDING.md, AGENT_CHAT.md.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. grep -i 'vibeflow' on all target files returns empty
2. Any remaining occurrences documented
3. Slice validation status reported

OUTPUT FORMAT: Per-file results with final PASS/FAIL status.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Single summary dependency, needs grep access

slices.name: File Renames
slices.description: Renames files with vibeflow in their names to use vibepilot
exposes: Renamed files with vibepilot in filenames
consumes: Content updates from docs-core and docs-research slices
slices.boundaries: Only file rename operations. Does NOT modify file content.

tasks.title: Rename vibeflow files to vibepilot
tasks.purpose: Rename files with vibeflow in their names to use vibepilot branding
objectives: Update any internal references if needed
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Rename files that contain 'vibeflow' in their filenames to use 'vibepilot' instead. This is a file rename operation that should occur AFTER content updates are complete. Renames: docs/vibeflow_dashboard_analysis.md → docs/vibepilot_dashboard_analysis.md, docs/vibeflow_review.md → docs/vibepilot_review.md, docs/vibeflow_adoption.md → docs/vibepilot_adoption.md, docs/research/raindrop-vibeflow-20260219.md → docs/research/raindrop-vibepilot-20260219.md.

WHAT TO BUILD: Execute git mv or mv commands to rename files. Check if any other files reference these filenames and update those references if found.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. All four files renamed successfully
2. Old filenames no longer exist
3. New filenames are present
4. Any internal references updated (check docs/ for markdown links)
5. ls -la shows correct new filenames

OUTPUT FORMAT: List of rename operations completed with confirmation.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: 4 code_context dependencies, needs to verify content updated before renaming

touches_slices: Depends on content updates from docs-core and docs-research

tasks.confidence_reasoning: File renames are straightforward but checking for and updating internal references adds complexity. Depends on prior content updates.

tasks.title: Validate file renames
tasks.purpose: Confirm all vibeflow files renamed to vibepilot
objectives: Verify old filenames do not exist
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Final validation for file-renames slice. Verify all rename operations completed successfully and no broken references exist.

WHAT TO BUILD: List files to confirm renames, search for any remaining references to old filenames in markdown links.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. No files with 'vibeflow' in name exist in docs/ or docs/research/
2. All expected new filenames exist
3. No broken markdown links to old filenames
4. Validation status reported

OUTPUT FORMAT: File listing with PASS/FAIL status for rename operations.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Single summary dependency, needs filesystem access for validation
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Read-only validation of file existence and link checking.

slices.name: Terminal Dashboard Verification
slices.description: Verifies terminal dashboard already uses VibePilot branding
exposes: Verification that terminal dashboard is already correct
slices.boundaries: Read-only verification. No modifications to terminal dashboard.

tasks.title: Verify terminal dashboard branding
tasks.purpose: Confirm terminal dashboard already displays VibePilot, no changes needed
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Read-only verification task for the terminal dashboard. Check if dashboard/terminal_dashboard.py already uses 'VibePilot' branding and contains no 'vibeflow' references.

WHAT TO BUILD: Run grep commands to verify current state. No file modifications.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. grep -i 'vibepilot' dashboard/terminal_dashboard.py returns matches (should show 'VIBEPILOT DASHBOARD')
2. grep -i 'vibeflow' dashboard/terminal_dashboard.py returns empty
3. Line 110 displays 'VIBEPILOT DASHBOARD'

OUTPUT FORMAT: Provide grep output and confirm verification status.
tasks.routing_flag_reason: Needs filesystem access to read and grep the file
tasks.confidence_reasoning: Read-only verification with simple grep commands. No modifications.

slices.name: Cross-Cutting Validation
slices.description: Final comprehensive validation across all slices and directories
consumes: Validation summaries from all other slices
slices.boundaries: Read-only validation only. Aggregates results from all slices.

tasks.title: Create and run comprehensive validation script
tasks.purpose: Final cross-cutting verification that no vibeflow remains anywhere in the project
objectives: Search root-level markdown files for any vibeflow
Check for files with vibeflow in name
tasks.prompt_packet:
CONTEXT: Final validation across the entire vibepilot project. Must confirm 100% brand consistency with zero vibeflow occurrences remaining anywhere. This is the gate before marking the rebrand complete.

WHAT TO BUILD: Run comprehensive grep searches across all directories: dashboard/, docs/ (including subdirectories), config/, plans/, and root-level markdown files. Also check for any files with 'vibeflow' in their names.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. dashboard/ - 0 occurrences
2. docs/ (recursive) - 0 occurrences
3. config/ (recursive) - 0 occurrences
4. plans/ - 0 occurrences
5. Root markdown files - 0 occurrences
6. No files with 'vibeflow' in name exist
7. Any exceptions documented with justification

OUTPUT FORMAT: Directory-by-directory results, file listing check, and final PASS/FAIL with summary.

touches_slices: Aggregates results from all 7 other slices

tasks.confidence_reasoning: Aggregates validated results from all slices. Comprehensive but straightforward grep operations.

cross_slice_interfaces.purpose: File renames must happen after content updates
File renames must happen after content updates

notes: Each slice operates on distinct file paths with minimal overlap
docs-core: Core docs/ markdown files (excluding research/)
file-renames: File rename operations only (depends on content updates)
cross-validate: Read-only aggregation of all slice results
Dependencies are summary-only (not code_context) except file-renames which needs content confirmation

execution_summary.rollback_complexity: Low (git revert or restore original files)
